title: Sir William Stanier School (Crewe): warning notice
body: "Notice relating to: Sir William Stanier School  URN: 139953  Notice issued to: The Learning Partnership Academies Trust  Reason for issue: ‘requires significant improvement’ Ofsted judgement  DfE regional director: Vicky Beer – but due to a conflict of interest, the decision was taken by Alison Wilson, Regional Director for Yorkshire and the Humber  DfE regional director office: North West  Local authority: Cheshire East Council "
